overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban park. The character approaches and passes a group of NPCs conversing on a wooden platform, then continues along a winding cobblestone path surrounded by dense vegetation and rock formations.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated wooden platform in a futuristic urban park. A person gets up from a green bench on the left and walks away as the camera approaches two figures standing ahead. Tall glass buildings are visible through the dense foliage on the sides.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a group of three NPCs conversing on the wooden platform near a concrete structure with blue supply bags. The character passes them and turns left onto a cobblestone path, leaving the platform area behind.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a winding cobblestone path through a densely vegetated park area. The path curves between large rock formations and trees, with futuristic light posts lining the route. The area is secluded with no other people visible, creating a tranquil atmosphere contrasting with the urban background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a futuristic urban park that transitions from a populated social hub into a secluded, natural sanctuary. It begins on an elevated wooden platform where a person rises from a green bench and walks away as the camera approaches two figures standing ahead, with glass skyscrapers peering through the surrounding foliage. As the camera passes a group of three NPCs conversing near a concrete structure and blue supply bags, the perspective turns left to leave the platform behind. The scene then shifts onto a winding cobblestone path that curves between large rock formations and trees, guided by futuristic light posts. Finally, the environment opens into a tranquil, densely vegetated area, leaving the urban bustle behind for a quiet landscape of stone and greenery.
